atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right hip pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right hip pain, primarily in the groin area, for approximately two years.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as exacerbated by movement, particularly pivoting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient rates the pain 2-7 out of 10.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional falls related to the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has had previous surgeries including a pcl and a gall bladder removal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has also experienced infertility treatment.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has had several bulging discs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies fever or chills.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies tingling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies bowel/bladder changes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that staying still provides relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports she doesn't want to stay still.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports having lost 110 pounds through weight watchers, starting in 2018.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals a height of 5'6"

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals a weight of 169 pounds

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals a blood pressure of 115/75

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pulse rate is 67

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No ankle edema is noted

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is decreased in exertion with lateral flexion

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The sacroiliac signs are negative

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The trochanteric region is non-tender

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is decreased in right hip with pain in the groin and internal and external rotation

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a catching sensation when walking on her heels and toes

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Deep tendon reflexes are normal throughout

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Right hip degenerative joint disease is the most likely diagnosis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's reported pain and limited range of motion are consistent with this diagnosis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will initiate a low-impact exercise program
